section.heading: Specific criteria for INTELSAT
section.chapeau: In securing the privatizations required by section 763 of this title, the following additional criteria with respect to INTELSAT privatization shall be applied as licensing criteria for purposes of part A:

paragraph.heading: 11 So in original. No par. (2) has been enacted. Technical coordination under intelsat agreements.—
paragraph.content: Technical coordination shall not be used to impair competition or competitors, and shall be conducted under International Telecommunication Union procedures and not under Article XIV(d) of the INTELSAT Agreement.
